context: Tests whether the agent correctly anonymizes order PII while preserving financial data and tax-jurisdiction fields, uses a database transaction for atomicity, stamps a pii_anonymized_at field to prevent re-processing, and uses the correct email anonymization format.

checklist.name: Email anonymization format
checklist.description: Anonymized email is set to 'anon_' + order.id + '@deleted.invalid' (exact format)

checklist.name: Customer name cleared
checklist.description: customer_name (or customerName) is set to 'Anonymous Customer' (exact string)

checklist.name: Shipping street nulled
checklist.description: shipping_street (or shippingStreet/shippingAddress) is set to null, not an empty string or placeholder

checklist.name: City and country preserved
checklist.description: shipping_city and shipping_country are NOT overwritten — they retain the original values (code does not assign null/anonymous to these fields)

checklist.name: Financial data untouched
checklist.description: Code does NOT overwrite total_amount, tax_amount, payment_method_brand, or payment_method_last4 (these fields are absent from the update payload or explicitly commented as preserved)

checklist.name: Transaction used
checklist.description: Anonymization updates are wrapped in a database transaction (db.transaction or trx equivalent)

checklist.name: pii_anonymized_at stamp
checklist.description: Each updated record has pii_anonymized_at set to the current date/time

checklist.name: Filter already-anonymized
checklist.description: Query filters out records where pii_anonymized_at is NOT NULL (i.e. skips already-anonymized records)

checklist.name: Batch size limit
checklist.description: Query uses a LIMIT (e.g. 500) to process records in bounded batches rather than fetching all rows at once

checklist.name: Billing fields cleared
checklist.description: billing_name (or billingName) is set to 'Anonymous' AND billing_street (or billingStreet) is set to null
